title: Hide Names Fabric
description: A mod that disables the player's username tag, allowing you to enjoy games like hide-and-seek with your friends on servers or LAN without visible usernames above your head.
body:
# Hide Names Fabric Mod (Minecraft 1.21)

Hide Names is a simple and fun Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21 that removes player name tags. Now you can play hide-and-seek with your friends on servers or LAN without any visible name tags!

**Please note:** Only player name tags are removed. Compasses, maps, and other tracking items remain fully functional.

Fabric API is required. Tested with: `fabric-api-0.102.0+1.21`.


## Download

- **GitHub:** Visit the releases section and download the latest release (e.g. `HideNames-Fabric-1.21-alpha-1.0.jar`).
- **Modrinth:** Also available for download here.

## Planned Features

1. **Player Tag Visibility Toggle:** 
   - Admins can enable or disable the visibility of player tags in multiplayer mode.

2. **Default Visibility Settings:** 
   - By default, player names are visible.
   - Names will be hidden if there is an obstruction (e.g., a block) between the player and the observer (note: this does not apply to transparent objects).

3. **Armor Enchantment:** 
   - An enchantment can be applied to armour (helmets) that hides the player's name regardless of any obstructions.
   
4. **Go fully server-side.**

### Features that MAY be added (depends on the vote results)

1. **Skin obfuscation:**
   - A special type of armour that completely conceals the player's skin, including the face—think of ninja suits.

2. **A name change:**
   - A non-craftable, single-use item (similar to the nametag) that can temporarily change username to a random/selected name (work in progress).

_These features are not planned yet. These are the recommendations, 
whether you like them or not, let me know!_

## Mod Status

- **Version:** `alpha-1.0`
- **Status:** Works as intended

*This is an alpha version, so while it functions as expected, occasional issues might occur.*

- **Forge Support:** Not available
- **Compatibility:** Works with Minecraft versions: 1.21 - Updates to newer/older versions are planned.


## Contact & Support

For feedback or assistance, please get in touch via:

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/MateuszPodeszwa/Hide-Names-Fabric-Mod-1.21/issues)
- [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/mateuszpodeszwa)

Your support and suggestions are greatly appreciated!
